metadata.description: Multi-agent orchestration tools for Claude Code.

plugins.name: tmux-orchestrator
plugins.description: Spawn Claude Code agents in isolated tmux windows with their own context, git worktrees, and task injection. Two-way communication via tmux send-keys.

plugins.name: claudecord
plugins.description: Discord-based agent communication. Per-agent channels, status boards, and phone-accessible orchestration. Requires tmux-orchestrator.
